_comment: Spec 19 cross-language parity fixture for the delete_nodes wire format. Both Rust (crates/server/tests/parity_delete_nodes.rs) and TypeScript (frontend/src/__tests__/parity-delete-nodes.test.ts) read this file and assert their respective transports emit the same op_type / value shape.

graphql_delete_nodes_input._description: GraphQL applyOperations input for a batch delete of two nodes

mcp_delete_nodes_input._description: MCP delete_nodes tool input for a single-target batch (edge case: N=1)
